{{Quote|I am Mushkil of Clan Baikh'vair. The way to a Jedi is through me.|Mushkil|<ref name="Tide" />}}
A [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] from [[Clan Baikh'vair]], '''Mushkil''' was one of a team of Noghri [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] from [[Honoghr/Legends|Honoghr]] that accompanied a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic Garqi reconnaissance team|reconnaissance team]] to the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] occupied [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]. After being inserted onto the planet via the [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] [[Best Chance (shuttle)|''Best Chance'']], the team [[Battle of Garqi|acquired]] a pair of [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[thrall]]s the Yuuzhan Vong had [[Biot|created]]. However, Mushkil and the majority of the team were trapped in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Pesktda]]'s [[Pesktda Xenobotanical Garden|Xenobotanical Garden]] by the Yuuzhan Vong forces, where the Noghri was [[Death/Legends|felled]] by the warrior [[Krag Val]].

==Biography==
Mushkil was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] [[Commando/Legends|commando]]<ref name="Tide" /> from the [[Species/Legends|species]]' [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Honoghr/Legends|Honoghr]],<ref name="TEGTAS" /> and was part of [[Clan Baikh'vair]].<ref name="Tide" /> In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]],<ref name="Date" /> during the initial stages of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], where the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] attempted to stop the advance of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Extragalactic/Legends|extra-galactic]] invaders, Mushkil and five other Noghri commandos were assigned to a [[New Republic Garqi reconnaissance team|reconnaissance team]] that was led by a trio of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]—[[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]], [[Ganner Rhysode]], and [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]]. The team's goal was to observe the Yuuzhan Vong and help the local resistance on the occupied [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]]. In order to be infiltrated onto Garqi, Mushkil and the team were crammed aboard the small [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] [[Best Chance (shuttle)|''Best Chance'']] which was in turn stuffed aboard the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Lost Hope]]''. While the [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighters]] of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] fended off the attacks on the ''Lost Hope'' by the Yuuzhan Vong [[Yorik-et|coralskippers]] after the freighter launched from the [[Bothan Assault Cruiser]] ''[[Ralroost]]'', the ''Lost Hope'' attempted to gain access to Garqi. However, as it was attempting this, the freighter seemingly exploded, leaving debris to fall down to Garqi below; among that debris was the ''Best Chance'', and it managed to make it to Garqi unseen by the enemy.<ref name="Tide" />

On Garqi, Mushkil and the team met up with the [[Resistance (Garqi)|local resistance]], led by [[Rade Dromath]]. They learned from them that the Yuuzhan Vong on Garqi had been [[Biot|creating]] an army of [[thrall]]s, which were [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] controlled by the invaders. They also learned that their enemy was pitting each batch of thralls against Yuuzhan Vong warriors and their [[Chazrach]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] in the streets of the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Pesktda]] in order to find the batch of thralls that was the most fit for combat. The team decided to [[Battle of Garqi|capture]] some of the thralls for analysis, and Mushkil and the group ambushed the Yuuzhan Vong warriors and their soldiers while they were fighting one of the batches of thralls. Mushkil and the Noghri commandos engaged the reptile-like Chazrach, and he and the other commandos cut a swath through them. However, the Yuuzhan Vong warriors managed to rally the thralls that had just been fighting them to their side, and both the thralls and the Chazrach attacked the team. Forced to retreat, the team captured a pair of thralls, and escaped from the battle, though they were pursued by Yuuzhan Vong warriors. While a small part of the group took the thralls back to the ''Best Chance'', Mushkil and the others found themselves trapped in the [[Pesktda Xenobotanical Garden]] in a grove of [[bafforr tree]]s by the enemy.<ref name="Tide" />

A standoff ensued, with the Yuuzhan Vong force led by the warrior [[Krag Val]] facing Mushkil and the team. During the standoff, Mushkil placed himself between the Jedi and the enemy, and declared that the enemy must get through him to attack the Jedi. A [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] bolt broke the standoff, and as both sides charged each other, Mushkil reached Val first. The Noghri cast a [[Knife/Legends|knife]] at the Yuuzhan Vong, but Val knocked it aside with his [[amphistaff]] before he swept Mushkil's feet out from under him and [[Death/Legends|impaled]] him with the staff. However, the team proved victorious after the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] bafforr trees let pollen fall upon the fighters, which caused the [[Vonduun Skerr Kyrric|living armor]] of the Yuuzhan Vong warriors to suffocate their wearers as the armor died. The bafforr tree grove was [[Fire/Legends|burned]] in order to hide the advantage the bafforr trees' pollen gave the New Republic against the invaders, and Mushkil's body was likewise consumed. The rest of the team later escaped Garqi with the thrall specimens.<ref name="Tide" />

==Personality and traits==
During the standoff, the Noghri warrior stood between the Yuuzhan Vong and the Jedi, to force the enemy to come through him to get the Jedi. Mushkil was a skilled warrior with his hands and feet, and he and the other Noghri cut through many Chazrach during the attempt to capture the thralls. He also reached Krag Val before the Jedi, though his skill with a knife failed to save him from Val's amphistaff.<ref name="Tide" />

==Behind the scenes==
Mushkil first appeared in [[2000]]'s novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'', written by [[Michael A. Stackpole]] as part of the [[Dark Tide duology|''Dark Tide Duology'']].<ref name="Tide" />
